column1: Supplementary Table S7. Targeted metabolites detected in cells and vesicles from Prochlorococcus strains MIT9312 and MIT9313. Values represent average relative biovolume-normalized peak areas with standard deviations (in parentheses), with the number of replicates where the compound was observed in a total of 3 biological replicates for each sample. Analytical fractions examined were reverse phase (RP)-organic-positive (RPOrg), RP-aqueous-positive (RPAq), hydrophilic interaction liquid chromatography (HILIC)-aqueous-positive (HILICPos), and HILIC-aqueous-negative (HILICNeg); for further details see Methods and Supplementary Table S8. nd = not detected.
